creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
From: <mikes@indiana.edu>
> apache13-fp for apache 1.3.9 copied from www.freebsd.org in
> ports/ports/www/apache13-fp directory, compiling under 3.3-RELEASE
>
> >Description:
>
> "Make" fails to create Makefile in ./src directory, make
> terminates
>
> >How-To-Repeat:
>
> "make" in apache13-fp directory
>
> >Fix:
>
> Apache configure appears to fail to create ./src/Makefile
>
I checked the port and see no differences between a CVSup'd version and one
fetched from
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/FreeBSD-current/ports/www/apache13-fp.tar

I tried both using "make build" with a clean ports directory and the
src/Makefile is created each time.

Scot
